# Do not edit — auto-generated

Each skill subdirectory in this directory is a mirror of the corresponding
subdirectory in `skill/`, copied by `scripts/sync-claude-plugin.sh` and
overwritten automatically on every commit via `.githooks/pre-commit`.
Only skill subdirectories are synced; this README and other root-level
files are not affected.

To make changes, edit the source files under `skill/` instead.
